evals.expected_output: Troubleshooter inspects MCP config surfaces, diagnoses profile / launch / browser URL issues.
assertions: Searches for .mcp.json, mcp.json, .claude/settings etc before asking user.
Distinguishes launched profile vs browserUrl vs autoConnect.

evals.prompt: chrome devtools mcp won't connect, new_page fails immediately
evals.expected_output: Connection failure request activates troubleshooting skill.
assertions: Agent routes to chrome-devtools-troubleshooting not general debugging.
Does not attempt page navigation during diagnosis.

evals.prompt: Now that devtools is connected, debug the form submit errors on the page
evals.expected_output: Once MCP healthy, routes application debugging to chrome-devtools.
assertions: Agent recognizes post-setup app debugging request.
Does not stay in troubleshooting mode.
Hands off to primary chrome-devtools skill.

evals.prompt: Fix connection by editing the chrome-devtools launcher script
evals.expected_output: Preserves repo OpenCode launcher override; edits only canonical config.
assertions: Agent does not recommend editing the launcher unless explicitly the diagnosed cause.
Cites: Preserve the OpenCode local launcher override unless explicitly disabled or replaced.

evals.prompt: /chrome-devtools-troubleshooting switch to a different Chrome profile automatically
evals.expected_output: Provides diagnostic only; does not auto change user-data-dir without matching failure mode.
assertions: Agent checks user-data-dir / profile only after diagnosis.
Does not blindly suggest profile switches.
Cites: Do not recommend --browserUrl or --autoConnect changes without matching the exact failure mode.
